contextBlurb: Ontario's 44th Parliament has introduced a range of housing-related legislation addressing tenant rights, homelessness, and housing construction. Key bills include Bill 60 (Fighting Delays, Building Faster Act, 2025), which amends planning and municipal rules to accelerate development, and Bill 51 (Rent Stabilization Act, 2025), which proposes a rent registry and caps on lawful rent increases. Additional measures such as Bill 28 (Homelessness Ends with Housing Act, 2025) and Bill 64 (Housing Equity and Rental Transparency Act, 2025) reflect ongoing legislative activity around housing affordability and tenant protections.

legislation.title: Zoning Order 001-2025 â€” City of Hamilton
legislation.summary: A Minister's Zoning Order made under the Planning Act regulating land use and building heights for specific parcels in the City of Hamilton, permitting buildings of up to 71 metres.

legislation.title: Zoning Order 002-2026 â€” City of Markham
legislation.summary: A Minister's Zoning Order permitting model homes and temporary sales offices in all zones in the City of Markham, in accordance with applicable zoning by-law provisions.

legislation.title: Zoning Order 005-2026 â€” City of Toronto
legislation.summary: A Minister's Zoning Order made under clause 47(1)(a) of the Planning Act, regulating the use of land and the erection, location, and use of buildings in a specified area of the City of Toronto.

legislation.title: Expanded HST Relief for New Home Buyers
legislation.summary: A government program expanding the HST New Housing Rebate and New Residential Rental Property Rebate, offering eligible buyers including first-time home buyers up to $130,000 in HST relief on new homes for one year.

legislation.title: Fighting Delays, Building Faster Act, 2025
legislation.summary: Amends planning and municipal legislation to accelerate housing development and reduce approval delays. Also modifies community improvement plan provisions for upper-tier municipalities.

legislation.title: An Act to amend the Residential Tenancies Act, 2006 and the Retirement Homes Act, 2010
legislation.summary: Proposes amendments to the Residential Tenancies Act, 2006 and the Retirement Homes Act, 2010, with a deferred second reading vote recorded in April 2026.

legislation.title: Protect Ontario by Building Faster and Smarter Act, 2025
legislation.summary: Legislation aimed at streamlining housing construction and development approvals across Ontario.

legislation.title: Building a More Competitive Economy Act, 2025
legislation.summary: An omnibus bill that amends multiple acts, including provisions affecting housing-related legislation and regulatory frameworks.

legislation.title: Plan to Protect Ontario Act (Budget Measures), 2025 (No. 2)
legislation.summary: Budget measures bill that includes a new section granting the Minister of Municipal Affairs and Housing authority to make regulations in connection with amendments to the Act.

legislation.title: Building Homes and Improving Transportation Infrastructure Act, 2026
legislation.summary: Legislation combining housing construction goals with transportation infrastructure improvements across Ontario.

legislation.billCode: Building Homes and Improving Transportation Infrastructure Act
legislation.title: Building Homes and Improving Transportation Infrastructure Act
legislation.summary: Introduced to improve the movement of people and goods across Ontario while speeding up the construction of new homes, tackling red tape and streamlining approvals.

legislation.title: Homelessness Ends with Housing Act, 2025
legislation.summary: Establishes the Government of Ontario's vision to eliminate homelessness in a transparent and accountable manner.

legislation.title: Rent Stabilization Act, 2025
legislation.summary: Proposes a rent registry maintained by the Landlord and Tenant Board and a mechanism for tenants to apply for orders where rent charged exceeds the maximum lawful rent.

legislation.title: EV-Ready Homes Act (Electric Vehicle Charging), 2025
legislation.summary: Requires homes to be equipped or ready for electric vehicle charging infrastructure.

legislation.title: Housing Equity and Rental Transparency Act, 2025
legislation.summary: Addresses housing equity and rental transparency, amending relevant acts governing residential tenancies in Ontario.
